data.content:
I've analyzed all 5 project files. Here's a summary of the issues and recommendations:

---

## 🔍 Issues Found

### 1. Massive Property Duplication
All 5 projects repeat these identical properties:
```
TargetFramework, LangVersion, Nullable, ImplicitUsings,
TreatWarningsAsErrors, EnforceCodeStyleInBuild, Company, Authors
```

### 2. Package Version Drift
The same packages have **different versions** across projects:

| Package | Core | Services | Api | Core.Tests | Api.Tests |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| `Logging.Abstractions` | 8.0.0 | **8.0.1** | 8.0.0 | — | — |
| `Microsoft.NET.Test.Sdk` | — | — | — | **17.10.0** | 17.9.0 |
| `xunit` | — | — | — | **2.8.1** | 2.7.1 |
| `xunit.runner.visualstudio` | — | — | — | **2.8.1** | 2.5.6 |

### 3. Duplicated Custom Target
The `PrintBuildInfo` target is copy-pasted into all 3 source projects.

### 4. Duplicated `DocumentationFile` Property
Set identically in all 3 source projects.

### 5. Missing Infrastructure Files
No `Directory.Build.props`, `Directory.Build.targets`, `Directory.Packages.props`, or `global.json`.

---

## ✅ Recommended Changes

### A. Add `Directory.Build.props` (repo root)
Centralizes common properties. All projects inherit automatically.

```xml
<Project>
  <PropertyGroup>
    <TargetFramework>net8.0</TargetFramework>
    <LangVersion>latest</LangVersion>
    <Nullable>enable</Nullable>
    <ImplicitUsings>enable</ImplicitUsings>
    <TreatWarningsAsErrors>true</TreatWarningsAsErrors>
    <EnforceCodeStyleInBuild>true</EnforceCodeStyleInBuild>
    <Company>Contoso</Company>
    <Authors>Contoso Engineering</Authors>
  </PropertyGroup>

  <!-- Source projects generate XML docs -->
  <PropertyGroup Condition="!$(MSBuildProjectName.EndsWith('.Tests'))">
    <DocumentationFile>$(OutputPath)$(AssemblyName).xml</DocumentationFile>
  </PropertyGroup>

  <!-- Test projects are not packable -->
  <PropertyGroup Condition="$(MSBuildProjectName.EndsWith('.Tests'))">
    <IsPackable>false</IsPackable>
  </PropertyGroup>
</Project>
```

### B. Add `Directory.Build.targets` (repo root)
Centralizes the duplicated custom build target.

```xml
<Project>
  <Target Name="PrintBuildInfo" BeforeTargets="Build"
          Condition="!$(MSBuildProjectName.EndsWith('.Tests'))">
    <Message Importance="high" Text="Building $(AssemblyName) [$(Configuration)]" />
  </Target>
</Project>
```

### C. Add `Directory.Packages.props` — Central Package Management
Pins every package to a single version, eliminating drift.

```xml
<Project>
  <PropertyGroup>
    <ManagePackageVersionsCentrally>true</ManagePackageVersionsCentrally>
  </PropertyGroup>
  <ItemGroup>
    <PackageVersion Include="Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.Abstractions" Version="8.0.1" />
    <PackageVersion Include="System.Text.Json" Version="8.0.5" />
    <PackageVersion Include="Newtonsoft.Json" Version="13.0.3" />
    <PackageVersion Include="Swashbuckle.AspNetCore" Version="6.5.0" />
    <PackageVersion Include="Microsoft.NET.Test.Sdk" Version="17.10.0" />
    <PackageVersion Include="xunit" Version="2.8.1" />
    <PackageVersion Include="xunit.runner.visualstudio" Version="2.8.1" />
    <PackageVersion Include="NSubstitute" Version="5.1.0" />
  </ItemGroup>
</Project>
```

Then each `.csproj` drops the `Version=` attribute from `<PackageReference>`.

### D. Add `global.json`
Pins the SDK version for reproducible builds.

```json
{
  "sdk": {
    "version": "8.0.400",
    "rollForward": "latestFeature"
  }
}
```

### E. Simplified `.csproj` files after cleanup

**ContosoApp.Core.csproj** — goes from 22 lines to:
```xml
<Project Sdk="Microsoft.NET.Sdk">
  <ItemGroup>
    <PackageReference Include="Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.Abstractions" />
    <PackageReference Include="System.Text.Json" />
  </ItemGroup>
</Project>
```

**ContosoApp.Api.Tests.csproj** — goes from 26 lines to:
```xml
<Project Sdk="Microsoft.NET.Sdk">
  <ItemGroup>
    <PackageReference Include="Microsoft.NET.Test.Sdk" />
    <PackageReference Include="xunit" />
    <PackageReference Include="xunit.runner.visualstudio" />
    <PackageReference Include="NSubstitute" />
  </ItemGroup>
  <ItemGroup>
    <ProjectReference Include="..\..\src\ContosoApp.Api\ContosoApp.Api.csproj" />
  </ItemGroup>
</Project>
```

---

## Impact Summary

| Metric | Before | After |
|---|---|---|
| Duplicated property lines | ~50 | 0 |
| Places to update TFM | 5 | 1 |
| Places to update a package version | per-project | 1 |
| Version drift risk | High | Eliminated |
| New infra files | 0 | 4 (`Directory.Build.props`, `.targets`, `Directory.Packages.props`, `global.json`) |

Would you like me to implement these changes?
